---
title: "Exam Formula Sheet"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    output-file: exam-formula-sheet-handout.pdf
    number-sections: false
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=10mm
      - bottom=10mm
      - left=12mm
      - right=12mm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
        \setlength{\abovedisplayskip}{3pt}
        \setlength{\belowdisplayskip}{3pt}
        \setlength{\abovedisplayshortskip}{1pt}
        \setlength{\belowdisplayshortskip}{1pt}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\large\bfseries}{\thesection}{1em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalfont\small\bfseries}{\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{6pt}{2pt}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{4pt}{1pt}
        \titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{3pt}{1pt}
  docx:
    toc: false
    output-file: exam-formula-sheet-handout.docx
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: exam-formula-sheet-slides.html

---

```{r, eval = FALSE, include = FALSE}

# quarto render "exam-formula-sheet.qmd" --profile "handout"
```

{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

# Epi 202: Probability

{{< include _subfiles/exam-formula-sheet/_sec_epi202_probability.qmd >}}

# Epi 203: Statistical inference

{{< include _subfiles/exam-formula-sheet/_sec_epi203_statistical-inference.qmd >}}

# Sta 108: Linear regression

{{< include _subfiles/exam-formula-sheet/_sec_sta108_linear-regression.qmd >}}

# Epi 204: Generalized linear models

{{< include _subfiles/exam-formula-sheet/_sec_epi204_glms-and-survival.qmd >}}
